privacyNotice: We take your privacy seriously. All connections are encrypted and your data stays yours.

intro.login: Welcome back! Choose a method to sign in:

completion.loginMessage: Your account data has been synced. Click below to continue.
completion.googleLoginMessage: Your Google account is signed in and your data has been synced.
completion.registerMessage: Your account has been created. Click below to sign in and return.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.

errors.googleLoginFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.googleInitFailed: Google sign-in could not be started. Please try again.
